Javascript.HintText: Select or enter the date stayed in the format DD-MON-YYYY
Javascript.initialise: var expiryDate = getObligationExpiryDate(6); Services.setValue( StayDate.dataBinding, expiryDate );

Context.initialise: var expiryDate = Services.getValue("/ds/wp/MaintainObligations/Obligations/Obligation[ObligationType='6' and DeleteFlag='N']/ExpiryDate"); Services.setValue( StayDate.dataBinding, expiryDate );
